title: Github Copilot not launching with VSCode
author: Alex X
text:
I am on Linux and I use VS Code, every time I restart VS Code, Copilot is just not there. In Output, it doesn't show up either, so I am pretty sure it is just not starting. I am logged into GitHub and the GitHub Authentication seems to be successful. I have Copilot as part of the Developer Students pack.
I tried uninstalling and installing other versions, it didn't help, the only thing that helps is deleting the extension folder and then reinstalling.
excerpt:
I am on Linux and I use VS Code, every time I restart VS Code, Copilot is just not there. In Output, it doesn't show up either, so I am pretty sure it is just not starting. I am logged into GitHub and the GitHub Authentication seems to be successful. I have Copilot as part of the Developer Students pack.
I tried uninstalling and installing other versions, it didn't help, the only thing that helps is deleting the extension folder and then reinstalling.
